caption: A person's hand holds a graded sports card in a protective plastic case over a table decorated with a green palm tree design. The hand tilts and rotates the card, showcasing its holographic surface and a signature. In the background, a man wearing a navy blue t-shirt sits at a desk with a computer monitor and keyboard, appearing as a small inset window on the screen. The logo "JASPYS" and the text "CASEBREAKS.COM" are prominently displayed in red and white across the top of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the hand continues to manipulate the card to catch the light, while the man in the inset remains seated at his workstation. The background includes stacks of similar graded cards, suggesting a professional card-breaking or collecting environment.
